title: adenostoma fasciculatum var. prostratum
intro: Adenostoma fasciculatum var. prostratum, also known as Purple Bush, is a low-growing, shrubby plant native to the coastal sage scrub ecosystem of California and Baja California. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Purple Bush include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system, as well as its potential to treat various skin conditions and infections. Purple Bush can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and resilience.
